indications.text:
RETIN-A MICRO® is indicated for the topical treatment of acne vulgaris in adults and pediatric patients 12
years of age and older.

®
Retin-A Micro (tretinoin) Gel microsphere, 0.1%, 0.08% and 0.04%, is a retinoid indicated for
topical application in the treatment of acne vulgaris.
